description: Plain-English security tip framed as a 'threat of the week'.
angle: Name one current threat, explain it simply, give one practical defense. Reassuring, not fear-mongering.

description: Backup and disaster recovery, myth vs reality.
angle: Bust one common misconception about backups (e.g. 'we have backups so we are safe'). Explain what real recoverability looks like.

description: Compliance spotlight rotating NIST / HIPAA / CJIS / SEC / PCI, tied to a vertical.
angle: Pick one framework, explain in plain English why it matters for a specific industry, and how an MSP makes it manageable.

description: Phishing red flags employees should know.
angle: List 2-3 concrete tells of a phishing message. Educational, empowering, end with a soft CTA.

description: Password and MFA basics done right.
angle: Explain why MFA matters and one practical way to roll it out without frustrating staff.
Demystify managed IT for a small business owner. Frame the MSP as a dedicated IT department without the overhead.

description: Why a local Austin IT partner beats a faceless national provider.
angle: Lean into being Austin-based: local, responsive, knows Texas businesses. A real partner you can reach, not a distant call center.

description: Vertical spotlight: Ministries & Non-Profits (houses of worship).
angle: Speak to a ministry or non-profit: protect donor data and member info on a tight budget. Warm, mission-aligned tone.

description: Vertical spotlight: Public Safety & Municipalities (CJIS, body cam storage, dispatch reliability).
angle: Speak to a police department or municipality: CJIS-compliant body cam storage, dispatch uptime, ransomware resilience, audit-ready docs.
Speak to a manufacturer: downtime costs money, OT/IT convergence creates risk. Strategic infrastructure framing.

description: Vertical spotlight: Hospitality & Retail Franchises (POS/PCI, guest wifi).
angle: Speak to a franchise or hospitality operator: secure POS, PCI compliance, safe guest wifi across locations.

description: Helpdesk / fast-response value prop, human story angle.
angle: Tell the value of fast, human helpdesk response. A real person picks up. Frame around reassurance and trust.

description: Patch management and why 'we'll do it later' is risky.
angle: Explain why timely patching matters, using a relatable 'we'll get to it' scenario. Practical, non-judgmental.

description: Small-business cyber stat + reassurance + soft CTA.
angle: Use the ~60% of small businesses close within 6 months of a cyberattack stat sparingly, then pivot to reassurance and accessible protection.
One practical cloud security tip for M365 or Azure (e.g. conditional access, secure sharing). Keep it approachable.

description: 'Enterprise security for small business, on purpose' credibility post.
angle: Lean into the tagline: we brought enterprise IT security to small business, on purpose. Credibility + mission, no enterprise price tag.
